positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a mountain landscape merging into a deep indigo night sky. The mountains should have clean, geometric silhouettes (like simplified Scandinavian folk art) filled with a glowing bioluminescent effect, subtly representing stars and constellations. Below the mountains, a gentle, flowing river of ethereal, pastel-colored light flows across a stylized landscape of minimalist foliage and abstract rock formations. The overall mood is mystical and calming. Style: Vector illustration combined with gradient glow effects, suitable for screen printing. Color palette: Deep blues, violets, teal, accented with soft gold and cyan glow. Composition: Symmetrical, centered, strong contrast between the solid silhouette foreground and the luminous background. Ultra-detailed, clean lines, high contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blur, grainy, sketch, low detail, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logos, messy, busy background, bad anatomy
